evidence_refs: Name/code similarity: "Select" matches "Action Card as simpler structural component — The Action Card should rely on the shared card system without becoming overdesigned. It is a structural grouping, not an intelligence surface. — Action Card supports selection, expand/collapse, drag/drop, reorder inside phase, move between phases, delete, task count, empty-action warning, readiness state, and locked state. No heatmap/visual-intelligence layer now." (score: 0.85)
